2603.20180.title: Adaptive Greedy Frame Selection for Long Video Understanding
2603.20180.paper_summary: Large vision--language models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to long-video question answering, yet inference is often bottlenecked by the number of input frames and resulting visual tokens. Naive sparse sampling can miss decisive moments, while purely relevance-driven selection frequently collapses onto near-duplicate frames and sacrifices coverage of temporally distant evidence. We propose a question-adaptive greedy frame selection method that jointly optimizes query relevance and semantic representativeness under a fixed frame budget. Our approach constructs a 1~FPS candidate pool (capped at 1000) with exact timestamp alignment, embeds candidates in two complementary spaces (SigLIP for question relevance and DINOv2 for semantic similarity), and selects frames by greedily maximizing a weighted sum of a modular relevance term and a facility-location coverage term. This objective is normalized, monotone, and submodular, yielding a standard (1-1/e) greedy approximation guarantee. To account for question-dependent trade-offs between relevance and coverage, we introduce four preset strategies and a lightweight text-only question-type classifier that routes each query to its best-performing preset. Experiments on MLVU show consistent accuracy gains over uniform sampling and a strong recent baseline across frame budgets, with the largest improvements under tight budgets.
2603.20180.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺-語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地應用於長視頻問答，但推理通常受到輸入幀數量和相應視覺標記的瓶頸。天真的稀疏取樣可能會錯過關鍵時刻，而純粹以相關性為驅動的選擇經常會集中在近似重複的幀上，並犧牲對時間上遙遠證據的覆蓋。我們提出了一種問題自適應的貪婪幀選擇方法，該方法在固定幀預算下共同優化查詢相關性和語義代表性。我們的方法構建了一個1 FPS的候選池（上限為1000），並進行精確的時間戳對齊，將候選者嵌入兩個互補的空間（SigLIP用於問題相關性，DINOv2用於語義相似性），並通過貪婪地最大化模塊相關性項和設施位置覆蓋項的加權總和來選擇幀。這一目標是標準化的、單調的和次模的，提供了標準的（1-1/e）貪婪近似保證。為了考慮與問題相關的相關性和覆蓋之間的權衡，我們引入了四種預設策略和一個輕量級的僅文本問題類型分類器，將每個查詢路由到其表現最佳的預設。對MLVU的實驗顯示，在幀預算上，相較於均勻取樣和一個強大的近期基準，我們的方法在準確性上持續獲得提升，尤其在緊張預算下改善最大。
2603.20180.author: Yuning Huang et.al.
